heading: Authorizations of appropriations for Development Fund for Africa
label: 2294 Authorizations of appropriations for Development Fund for Africa
text: Funds appropriated to carry out this part are authorized to be made available until expended. It is the sense of the Congress that the authority of this subsection should be used to extend the period of availability of those funds whenever appropriate to improve the quality of assistance provided under .1section 2293 of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “section”.1
